summary: User file & media storage: multipart upload with envelope-encrypted blobs at rest, per-user RLS isolation, and authenticated download.
env: MEDIA_ROOT — filesystem directory for stored blobs (default ./_media); blobs are envelope-encrypted at rest.
MEDIA_MAX_BYTES — maximum upload size in bytes (default 10485760 = 10 MiB).
MEDIA_ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES_0, _1, … — optional content-type allowlist; unset means all types are accepted.
userSteps: The local blob store keeps envelope-encrypted files under MEDIA_ROOT on the API host; for multi-instance or production deployments, back it with shared or object storage behind the same IBlobStore.
In production apply the schema and RLS with `dotnet ef database update`; in Development the app creates them at startup.
